case_title: CHERI MCCLENDON VS. CITY COLLEGE OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF MCCLENDON, CHERI
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MCCLENDON, CHERI AS TO DEFENDANT CITY COLLEGE OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCLENDON, CHERI

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES.
